data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: /dso:sprint session (2026-04-23), epic 78fc-3858

## Observed
Sub-agents dispatched with isolation:"worktree" (for tasks 3655-8ca5, cc08-555d docs-update agent) committed changes directly to the session branch (worktree-20260423-150226) rather than to their isolated worktree branch. The worktree list showed the agent's worktree at the main session branch tip after the commit.

## Impact
The per-worktree-harvest protocol was bypassed — no harvest-worktree.sh was needed since changes were already in the session branch. Work was valid and gates passed, but the isolation guarantee was violated.

## Suspected cause
Agents resolve REPO_ROOT via git rev-parse --show-toplevel and then use git from within the primary session worktree directory, ignoring the isolation worktree they were given.

## Expected
Agent should commit to the branch of the worktree it was given (the isolation branch), not the session branch. harvest-worktree.sh should then merge it into the session branch.

## Steps to reproduce
Dispatch Agent with isolation:"worktree" and observe git log after commit.
data.title: sprint: implementation sub-agents with isolation:worktree commit to session branch instead of isolated branch
